item.title: AI 驱动的搜索：文档和知识库的未来 | AI-Powered Search: The Future of Docs & Knowledgebase
item.description:
在当今快节奏的世界中，能够访问准确且相关的信息对于开发人员掌握最新技术和最佳实践至关重要。

这就是Doks.ai等人工智能搜索引擎的用武之地，彻底改变了开发人员访问文档和知识库的方式。

在这篇博文中，我们将探索使用 Doks.ai 在文档和知识库中进行 AI 搜索的强大功能，以及它如何帮助您的开发人员更快、更高效地找到他们需要的信息。

为什么人工智能驱动的搜索很重要

传统的搜索引擎虽然有用，但在为软件开发等高度专业化的领域提供准确且相关的结果时有时会出现不足。 开发人员通常会花费大量时间筛选搜索结果，试图找到问题的正确答案。

这使他们能够提供更准确和个性化的搜索结果，以满足开发人员的需求。

上下文感知搜索： Doks.ai 了解搜索查询的上下文并根据用户的意图提供结果。 这可确保开发人员收到相关且准确的信息，而无需筛选不相关的内容。
  • 个性化结果： Doks.ai 使用机器学习算法来分析用户的搜索历史和偏好，提供根据他们的需求和兴趣量身定制的个性化搜索结果。
  • 语义搜索： Doks.ai 先进的自然语言处理能力使其能够理解复杂搜索词的含义，并根据语义相关性提供结果。
  • 实时索引： Doks.ai 不断抓取您的文档和知识库并为其编制索引，确保您的开发人员始终可以获得最新的信息。
  • 多源集成： Doks.ai 可以与多个源集成，例如 GitHub 存储库、Confluence 页面和 Google 文档，允许开发人员在一个地方访问他们需要的所有信息。

    • 开始使用 Doks.ai

    要开始使用 Doks.ai，请按照以下简单步骤操作：

    1. 注册一个 Doks.ai 帐户：访问Doks.ai并注册一个帐户。
    2. 连接您的数据源：将 Doks.ai 与您现有的文档和知识库资源集成，例如 GitHub 存储库、Confluence 页面或 Google 文档。
    3. 配置您的搜索设置：自定义您的搜索设置，以确保 Doks.ai 为您的开发人员提供最相关和最准确的结果。
    4. 在您的网站或平台上嵌入 Doks.ai ：使用预构建的小部件将 Doks.ai 的搜索功能集成到您的网站或平台中。

    一旦暂停，ayushjangra 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

    解除暂停后，ayushjangra 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

    一旦取消发布，ayushjangra 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

    如果 ayushjangra 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

    笔记：

    感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 ayushjangra 的方法：

    降低 ayushjangra 的所有帖子的可见度

    报告其他不当行为

    取消标记 ayushjangra 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



    原文:

    In today's fast-paced world, having access to accurate and relevant information is crucial for developers to stay on top of the latest technologies and best practices.

    This is where AI-powered search engines like Doks.ai come in, revolutionizing the way developers access documentation and knowledge bases.

    In this blog post, we will explore the power of AI search in docs and knowledge bases with Doks.ai and how it can help your developers find the information they need faster and more efficiently.

    Why AI-Powered Search Matters

    Traditional search engines, while useful, can sometimes fall short when it comes to providing accurate and relevant results for highly specialized fields like software development. Developers often spend a significant amount of time sifting through search results, trying to find the right answer to their questions.

    AI-powered search engines like Doks.ai are designed to address these challenges by leveraging machine learning and natural language processing to understand the context and intent of a search query. This enables them to provide more accurate and personalized search results tailored to the needs of developers.

    Key Features of Doks.ai

    Doks.ai offers several powerful features that set it apart from traditional search engines:

    • Context-Aware Search: Doks.ai understands the context of a search query and provides results based on the user's intent. This ensures that developers receive relevant and accurate information without having to sift through unrelated content.
    • Personalized Results: Doks.ai uses machine learning algorithms to analyze a user's search history and preferences, providing personalized search results tailored to their needs and interests.
    • Semantic Search: Doks.ai's advanced natural language processing capabilities enable it to understand the meaning of complex search terms and provide results based on semantic relevance.
    • Real-Time Indexing: Doks.ai continuously crawls and indexes your documentation and knowledge base, ensuring that the most up-to-date information is always available for your developers.
    • Multi-Source Integration: Doks.ai can integrate with multiple sources, such as GitHub repositories, Confluence pages, and Google Docs, allowing developers to access all the information they need in one place.

    Getting Started with Doks.ai

    To get started with Doks.ai, follow these simple steps:

    1. Sign up for a Doks.ai account: Visit Doks.ai and sign up for an account.
    2. Connect your data sources: Integrate Doks.ai with your existing documentation and knowledge base sources, such as GitHub repositories, Confluence pages, or Google Docs.
    3. Configure your search settings: Customize your search settings to ensure that Doks.ai provides the most relevant and accurate results for your developers.
    4. Embed Doks.ai on your website or platform: Integrate Doks.ai's search functionality into your website or platform using the pre-built widget.

    🦾 Check it out here: doks.ai

    John Owolabi Idogun - Jun 5

    Once suspended, ayushjangra will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

    Once unsuspended, ayushjangra will be able to comment and publish posts again.

    Once unpublished, all posts by ayushjangra will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

    If ayushjangra is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

    Note:

    Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag ayushjangra:

    Make all posts by ayushjangra less visible

    ayushjangra consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

    Report other inappropriate conduct

    Unflagging ayushjangra will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: ayushjangra

item.title: 公司同时使用 Jira 和 Microsoft Teams 的 6 个原因 | 6 Reasons Why Companies Use Jira and Microsoft Teams Together
item.description:
奥卢瓦佩卢米

发表于 6 月 21 日

有效的协作和项目管理对于公司在当今快节奏和相互关联的商业环境中蓬勃发展至关重要。 以下是公司选择利用 Jira 和 Microsoft Teams 的集成来推动协作、项目管理和整体成功的六个原因。

  1. 简化协作：将 Jira 和 Microsoft Teams 结合创建一个协作生态系统，团队可以在其中无缝协作。 通过集成这些平台，您的团队可以在 Teams 渠道内集中进行对话、文档共享和知识共享，而 Jira 则提供了一个用于跟踪任务、问题和项目进度的结构化框架。 这种集成简化了协作，确保每个人都可以实时访问他们高效工作所需的相关信息。

  2. 增强的项目管理： Jira 以其出色的项目管理功能而闻名，使团队能够有效地规划、跟踪和管理项目。 通过将 Jira 与 Microsoft Teams 集成，您可以将项目管理功能直接引入 Microsoft Teams。 团队无需离开 Teams 界面即可创建和分配 Jira 任务、设置截止日期并跟踪进度。 不再需要在应用程序之间来回切换。

  3. 敏捷团队授权：对于遵循敏捷方法的公司来说，Jira 和 Microsoft Teams 的结合可以改变游戏规则。 与 Microsoft Teams 集成后，团队成员可以在熟悉的 Teams 环境中访问和更新 Jira 看板、查看冲刺进度并召开站立式会议。 这种集成使敏捷团队能够更有效地协作、调整和交付高质量的结果。

  4. 无缝沟通：有效的沟通对于成功的项目执行至关重要。 当与 Jira 结合使用时，集成允许围绕特定任务、问题或项目进行无缝通信。 用户可以直接在Teams频道中接收Jira通知，讨论项目相关事宜，无需在不同平台之间切换，保持畅通的沟通渠道。 这种集成促进了团队成员之间高效透明的沟通，消除了孤岛并加强了跨职能协作。

  5. 全面的任务和问题跟踪： Jira 的核心优势在于其强大的任务和问题跟踪功能。 通过将 Jira 与 Microsoft Teams 集成，公司可以将此功能引入协作工作区。 团队可以在团队内创建、分配和更新任务或问题，确保集中所有项目相关信息和更新。 这种集成为团队提供了项目进度的整体视图，从而可以做出更好的决策、有效地确定优先级并及时解决问题。

  6. 工作流自动化：自动化是优化的关键
    生产力和减少人工劳动。 通过利用 Microsoft Power Automate（以前称为 Flow）等工具，团队可以创建自动化工作流，根据 Teams 中的特定事件或条件在 Jira 中触发操作。 这种自动化提高了效率，减少了错误，并使团队能够专注于高价值的工作。

通过结合这些平台的优势，公司可以简化协作、增强敏捷团队的能力、促进无缝沟通、全面跟踪任务和问题，以及自动化工作流程。 无论您的组织是参与软件开发、项目管理还是任何其他协作活动，都可以利用这些力量。

一旦暂停，pelumikumuyi 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

一旦解除暂停，pelumikumuyi 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，pelumikumuyi 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 pelumikumuyi 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以通过以下方式标记 pelumikumuyi：

降低 pelumikumuyi 的所有帖子的可见性

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 pelumikumuyi 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Oluwapelumi

Posted on Jun 21

Effective collaboration and project management is crucial for companies to thrive in today's fast-paced and interconnected business environment. Jira and Microsoft Teams are two powerful tools that, when used together, can significantly enhance productivity, streamline workflows, and foster seamless communication within agile teams. Here are six reasons why companies choose to leverage the integration of Jira and Microsoft Teams to drive collaboration, project management, and overall success.

  1. Streamlined Collaboration: Combining Jira and Microsoft Teams creates a collaborative ecosystem where teams can seamlessly work together. By integrating these platforms, your team can centralize conversations, document sharing, and knowledge sharing within Teams channels, while Jira provides a structured framework for tracking tasks, issues, and project progress. This integration streamlines collaboration, ensuring everyone has real-time access to the relevant information they need to work efficiently.

  2. Enhanced Project Management: Jira is known for its awesome project management capabilities, empowering teams to plan, track, and manage projects effectively. By integrating Jira with Microsoft Teams, you can bring project management functionality directly into Microsoft Teams. Teams can create and assign Jira tasks, set due dates, and track progress without leaving the Teams interface. No more toggling back and forth between apps.

  3. Agile Team Empowerment: For companies following agile methodologies, the combination of Jira and Microsoft Teams is a game-changer. Jira offers extensive support for agile practices such as Scrum and Kanban, providing agile teams with boards, backlogs, and sprints to manage their work effectively. When integrated with Microsoft Teams, team members can access and update Jira boards, review sprint progress, and conduct stand-up meetings, all within the familiar Teams environment. This integration empowers agile teams to collaborate, adapt, and deliver high-quality results more efficiently.

  4. Seamless Communication: Effective communication is vital for successful project execution. Microsoft Teams serves as a hub for real-time messaging, video conferencing, and file sharing, enabling team members to collaborate effortlessly. When combined with Jira, the integration allows for seamless communication around specific tasks, issues, or projects. Users can receive Jira notifications directly in Teams channels, discuss project-related matters, and maintain a clear line of communication without switching between different platforms. This integration fosters efficient and transparent communication among team members, eliminating silos and enhancing cross-functional collaboration.

  5. Comprehensive Task and Issue Tracking: Jira's core strength lies in its robust task and issue tracking capabilities. By integrating Jira with Microsoft Teams, companies can bring this functionality into the collaborative workspace. Teams can create, assign, and update tasks or issues within Teams, ensuring that all project-related information and updates are centralised. This integration provides teams with a holistic view of project progress, enabling better decision-making, effective prioritisation, and timely issue resolution.

  6. Workflow Automation: Automation is key to optimising
    productivity and reducing manual effort. The integration between Jira and Microsoft Teams enables companies to automate workflows and streamline repetitive tasks. By leveraging tools like Microsoft Power Automate (formerly Flow), teams can create automated workflows that trigger actions in Jira based on specific events or conditions in Teams. This automation enhances efficiency, reduces errors, and enables teams to focus on high-value work.

The integration of Jira and Microsoft Teams brings numerous benefits to companies seeking to enhance collaboration, project management, and overall productivity. By combining the strengths of these platforms, companies can streamline collaboration, empower agile teams, facilitate seamless communication, track tasks and issues comprehensively, and automate workflows. Whether your organisation is involved in software development, project management, or any other collaborative endeavour, harnessing the power.

Teams like Klarna, Tesla and BMW use Microsoft Teams Jira Connector, schedule a free Demo here to see how we can 10x your team efficiency

Teja Bhutada - Jul 12 '21

Arun Kumar Singh - Jun 8 '21

Once suspended, pelumikumuyi will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, pelumikumuyi will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by pelumikumuyi will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If pelumikumuyi is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag pelumikumuyi:

Make all posts by pelumikumuyi less visible

pelumikumuyi consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging pelumikumuyi will restore default visibility to their posts.
